EMPTY_NEW_PROJECT.definition: active_project contains only reserved AOS directories or no payload files.
strategy: Do not generate code until minimum truth exists

SPEC_ONLY_PROJECT.definition: Project contains docs/specs but no executable code.

EXISTING_UNDOCUMENTED_PROJECT.definition: Project contains code but weak or missing truth artifacts.

LEGACY_COMPLEX_PROJECT.definition: Large mixed codebase with many languages, duplicates, or unclear boundaries.
